cases.prompt: Write tests for this function: function add(a, b) { return a + b }

assertions.text: Includes test for normal positive integer addition.
Includes tests for zero, negative numbers, decimals, and type edge cases (NaN, Infinity).
Test file matches the project's existing test framework and style.

cases.prompt: 결제 체크아웃 플로우의 종합적인 시나리오 테스트 작성해줘

assertions.text: The agent uses the 7 scenario categories (Happy/Sad/Bad/Race/Boundary/Permission/State) from references/scenario-matrix.md.
Includes payment failure (insufficient funds, expired card) and adversarial inputs (negative amount, SQL injection).
Includes cart→checkout→payment→confirmation state transitions and blocks invalid transitions.

cases.prompt: 이 새 기능 구현 전에 어떤 시나리오 테스트가 필요한지 미리 뽑아줘

assertions.text: The agent produces a scenario matrix (input × state × permission).
The agent identifies Tier 1 (Critical) scenarios that must be written first.
The agent maps each scenario to appropriate test level (Unit/Integration/E2E).
